purpose: Break the engineering handoff into executable Codex task cards.
global_constraints: No live APIs in first pass.
No sample data presented as live.
Preserve No Attack macro event gating.
Preserve user-specific risk and behavior guardrails.

tasks.title: Create repository skeleton
tasks.goal: Create a local React/TypeScript project skeleton for AMOS without connecting live APIs.
steps: Initialize Next.js or Vite React + TypeScript.
Create docs, artifacts, public/sample-data, src/components, src/data, src/rules, src/tests.
Copy canonical/handoff/no-omission docs into docs.
Add README with current phase: v0.3A Manual Data Alpha.
Add sample-data warning to README.
acceptance: npm install succeeds.
npm run dev starts local app.
README links to no-omission checklist.
No live APIs are configured.
forbidden: Do not add live market data API.

tasks.title: Implement design tokens and AppShell
tasks.goal: Preserve the AMOS dark terminal/research cockpit visual language in reusable layout components.
steps: Extract dark background, gold/cyan/green/red palette, card borders and typography rules.
Create AppShell with sidebar navigation.
Create StatusBar showing phase, mode, Gann Live count, Anchor Check version.
Ensure mobile layout works.
acceptance: AppShell matches AMOS prototype language.
StatusBar shows v0.3A, Manual, Gann Live 5, Anchor Check v0.2.
No generic template styling replaces AMOS style.
forbidden: Do not use a plain white dashboard style.

tasks.title: Load local manifests and sample data
tasks.goal: Create local data loaders and TypeScript schemas for AMOS JSON/CSV-driven prototype.
steps: Copy source JSON files into public/sample-data.
Create TypeScript interfaces for Ticker, GannEngine, EvidencePacket, MacroEvent, DailyBrief.
Implement local fetch/load functions.
Add validation fallback for missing fields.
acceptance: Gann registry loads locally.
Daily brief fallback rows load locally.
Types compile.
Missing optional fields do not crash app.
forbidden: Do not hardcode live data claims.

tasks.title: Implement Guardrail system
tasks.goal: Encode AMOS guardrails in UI and logic, not just static text.
steps: Implement sample/manual-ready warning banner.
Implement Missing freshness → no aggressive action cap.
Implement unverified Gann anchor → research-only rendering.
Implement critical event → No Attack default.
Implement evidence without counter-evidence → cannot influence action.
acceptance: Guardrails are visible on all relevant pages.
Rules are reusable pure functions.
Rules have tests in later task.
Gann cannot emit buy/sell alone.
forbidden: Do not make guardrails dismissible by default.
Do not hide sample-data warning behind tooltip only.

tasks.title: Implement Master Index page
tasks.goal: Convert AMOS Alpha Master Index v0.5 into the app home page.
steps: Show phase, deliveries, Gann Live, Pending, Anchor Check, Mode.
Render current workflow.
Render module sections and links/routes.
Include important guardrail.
acceptance: Home page clearly says v0.3A Manual Data Alpha.
Shows Gann Live 5 / Pending 0.
Links to Gann Registry, stock pages, Daily Brief, Events, Evidence.
No source section from v0.5 is silently omitted.
forbidden: Do not replace master index with a generic landing page.

tasks.title: Implement Gann Registry page
tasks.goal: Render Gann Live Registry v0.4 from local JSON.
steps: Load registry JSON.
Render five Gann Live tickers.
Show engine file, data quality, price/time/unified scores, resonance state.
Show hard missing data.
Show guardrail: sample/manual-ready, not live.
acceptance: CRDO / NVDA / LITE / IREN / HOOD all render as Gann Live.
No pending tickers in sample set.
Missing gates are visible.
Anchor Verification link is visible.
forbidden: Do not convert Gann Live into trade signal.

tasks.title: Implement Stock Intelligence pages
tasks.goal: Create reusable StockIntelligencePage for five sample tickers.
steps: Implement route for ticker.
Render ticker profile, action, confidence/data cap.
Render GannResearchZone with anchor gate.
Render missing data and hard missing gates.
Stub remaining modules but keep headings: valuation, price action, AVWAP, RSI, options/gamma, narrative, evidence, risk, peer map.
acceptance: Five sample tickers render.
Every page has Gann Zone.
Every page has sample-data warning.
No required Stock Intelligence module heading is omitted.
Missing modules are marked Pending, not silently deleted.
forbidden: Do not simplify stock page to only price chart and summary.
Do not remove user-specific risk protection modules.

tasks.title: Implement Daily Brief page
tasks.goal: Render daily brief from local JSON/config fallback and preserve action buckets.
steps: Load fallback rows.
Compute action counts, freshness counts, Gann counts.
Render action buckets and ticker rows.
Render guardrails.
acceptance: Daily brief matches exported HTML structure.
Missing Data count is visible.
Gann Live count is visible.
Trim Watch and Wait are visually distinct.
forbidden: Do not remove guardrails from brief.

tasks.title: Implement Macro Events page
tasks.goal: Render manual macro/event calendar structure and No Attack logic.
steps: Create local event sample JSON if needed.
Render event category, importance, risk mode, action cap.
Highlight Critical events and No Attack caps.
Show official source links as metadata.
acceptance: Critical events default to No Attack.
OPEX/FOMC/CPI/Treasury/BTC/Earnings categories are present.
Event guardrail tests pass.
forbidden: Do not treat event calendar as decoration; it must cap action.

tasks.title: Implement Evidence Packet page
tasks.goal: Render evidence claims with quality, bias, counter-evidence and action gate.
steps: Create sample evidence JSON from existing workbook/config.
Render claim, source type, quality, bias risk, counter-evidence, what would prove it wrong.
Implement no-counter-evidence action block.
Show source quality notes.
acceptance: Evidence without counter-evidence cannot influence action.
Source quality and bias risk are visible.
Claims are linked to ticker(s).
forbidden: Do not allow YouTube/X claims to bypass evidence gates.

tasks.title: Add guardrail test suite
tasks.goal: Make AMOS safety and no-omission guardrails executable tests.
steps: Test Missing freshness blocks Attack.
Test unverified anchors force Research Only / Watch.
Test hard_missing_data caps Gann action.
Test Critical event defaults No Attack.
Test evidence without counter-evidence cannot influence action.
Test sample-data banner required on Gann/Stock pages.
acceptance: All guardrail tests pass.
Tests fail if Gann emits buy/sell alone.
Tests fail if missing-data aggressive action is allowed.
forbidden: Do not mark guardrail tests as optional.

tasks.title: Create engineering README and implementation report
tasks.goal: Document what Codex implemented, what remains, and where source artifacts live.
steps: Write setup commands.
List routes and components.
List source artifacts copied.
List guardrail tests.
List known limitations and next tasks.
State no live APIs / no brokerage.
acceptance: New engineer can run project from README.
Implementation report states exactly what is done and not done.
No-omission checklist is linked.
